name: Chocolate Crinkle Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line small muffin cups (1-3/4 inches in diameter) with paper or foil baking cups.
3. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the mixture. Add sugar and stir until well blended.
4. Remove from heat; stir in cocoa and vanilla extract.
5. Add egg whites; stir to blend.
6. Stir in flour and chopped walnuts. Fill muffin cups three-fourths full with batter.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from pan and let cool completely.
